overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a prairie landscape in a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2), approaching a temporary horse camp with a covered wagon at golden hour, then ascending a rocky hillside to overlook the valley. The scene features cinematic lighting with warm tones, detailed grass physics, and dynamic shadows.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall prairie grass toward a horse camp with a covered wagon

notable_agents.action: white horse grazing in the tall grass
brown horses standing near the covered wagon

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon with canvas top and supplies
large rock formation rising on the right side of the prairie
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon
dense tall prairie grass swaying in the wind

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through dense tall grass in a wide-open prairie during golden hour. A covered wagon sits in the middle distance with horses grazing nearby, while a large rocky outcrop looms on the right and mountains are visible in the far distance.

events.description: passing the horse camp and transitioning from grassland to rocky terrain
beginning ascent up the rocky hillside, moving away from the wagon

agents.ego_description: walking past the horses and wagon, beginning to climb the rocky slope on the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered stone textures
rocks and stones scattered across the dirt path
small trees and bushes on the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the horse camp and wagon, moving into rockier terrain. The ground transitions from grass to dirt and stone as the path begins ascending the hillside. Large rock formations dominate the right side while scattered boulders appear on the path ahead.

events.description: reaching the crest of the hill with panoramic view of the valley below
sun becomes directly visible as camera crests the hill, increasing brightness

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky path to the hilltop, then walking along the ridge to survey the expansive landscape

entered.detail: wide prairie valley stretching to the horizon with rolling hills
single large tree standing on the hilltop against the sky
distant mountain peaks visible across the valley

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the rocky hillside, reaching the crest around 45 seconds to reveal a panoramic view of the valley below. The landscape opens up to show rolling prairie, distant mountains, and a solitary tree silhouetted against the bright sun. The terrain transitions from rocky outcrops to grassy hilltop as the camera explores the ridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden prairie that gradually ascends into a panoramic mountain overlook. It begins by gliding through dense tall grass toward a covered wagon and grazing horses, with a large rocky outcrop looming to the right against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera passes the camp, the lush greenery gives way to a rugged path of dirt and stone, shifting the terrain toward the base of the hillside. The scene then climbs steeply through dominating rock formations and scattered boulders before reaching the crest of the ridge. Finally, the landscape opens into a wide valley view, transitioning from rocky outcrops to a grassy hilltop where a solitary tree stands silhouetted against the bright sun.
